texto: Refusing the false securities of a stable and linear past, such an approach celebrates heterogeneous sensations and surprising associations, random connections, the ongoing construction of meaning and also admits into its orbit the mysterious agency of artifacts, space and non-humans from the past.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Edensor sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Refusing the false securities of a stable and linear past, such an approach celebrates heterogene…” articula reflexao, adventure, exploration em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como exploration e ruins.
